title: The Dark Forest
description: A vanilla style survival mod to make the Minecraft experience harder.
body:
Description: The Dark Forest is a mod with tons of items, structures, and survival mechanics that make Minecraft more realistic while not losing the vanilla Minecraft feel. Some examples of these features include:

- Bleeding and temperature mechanics
- Bandages (clears the bleeding effect)
- Traps (Deals damage and gives slowness)
- Skill Orbs (Allows you to research various items in the mod)
- Research Tree (Shows the skill orbs needed to research items such as bandages)
- Heart Containers (Increases max health, limit is five extra hearts)
- Biome specific structures (each have their own loot tables and items)
- Nightly Events (At night players could be ambushed, caught in a thunderstorm, and more)


Why you should download "The Dark Forest": The Dark Forest is for players who like a challenge and are willing to try their hardest to survive using unconventional methods and tactics they might not have used before. If you don't think you are the right person for this description it is still recommended that you give it a try, after all you might find something worthwhile. 

Extra Info: If you are looking for this type of mod remember that this is a hardcore experience and that this mod makes it so that you only have three lives, if you lose all three you are sent into spectator mode.
